name: Hector Muniz | ALT
description:
◇ — Firehouse 62 | KΑΣ — ◇
oc | 2010's setting | your giant, muscular, admirer

Hector fell in love with you the first time he saw you in the library, where he was buried in books, studying for an upcoming test.You were so radiant and delicate, that he thought nothing could match your beauty.

As a member of the KΑΣ fraternity, Hector assumed it would be easy to approach you. However, he never thought that his big size and muscles would be an intimidating thing for you, and little by little he realized that maybe it wouldn't be so easy. so he can get closer to you, even if he is popular or not.


I'm thinking my frat boy series is going to be
all about younger versions of the firefighters from Firehouse 62 haha

Just kidding, I'll introduce frat boys soon
(besides our beloved firefighters)

I loved doing this version of Muniz, just like I'm in love with the younger version of Sully.
I hope you fall in love too.

Fun fact:
I had to edit by hand almost the entire face of the image I created in AI for the younger version of Muniz,
I even added the mole he has on his cheek to make it look more like him.

This is an alternative scenario of the second bot of the Firehouse 62 series,
and an introduction for the next series, the KΑΣ's frat boys.

This series will be based on the fictional Firehouse 62, involving characters of firefighters, rescue personnel, and paramedics, and all the drama that surrounds their lives.

After all, who wouldn't want to be rescued by a hot firefighter?
creator: chloehills
